media.alt_text: Vanilla Bean Coconut Milk Kefir - Combo

variants.title: Vanilla Bean Coconut Milk Kefir - Combo

description.plain: World's 1st and the only 100% Vegan Plant-Based Milk Kefir Vanilla Bean Coconut Milk kefir is a 100% Vegan and powerful drink that strengthens your gut and boosts your immune system. It has the highest amount of rich and diverse healthy bacteria out of any other probiotic food/drink on the market. It’s rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and fiber. The coconut milk kefir has close to 50 different strains of active healthy bacteria that are made with a unique wild fermentation technique and superior ingredients. We use living bacteria to ferment our house-made vegan coconut milk and our kefir boasts of 82 billion probiotics per bottle with close to 50 different strains, while other generic probiotic drinks contain only 4 strains. Because of its unique diversity of healthy bacteria, milk kefir is called the Drink of the good gut Health. Ingredients: House-Made Coconut Milk Live Probiotic Cultures Non-Alcohol Vanilla Extract Filtered Water 100% Vegan Dosage: Recommended dose of 2-4 oz per day best taken in the morning with or without other food. Generally, people buy 6 or more bottles at a time. Our product is safe and completely delicious upon arrival no matter what temperature they arrive because we only use environment friendly glass bottles. Please refrigerate upon receiving. By now we know we need these superfoods in our diet every single day! Fermenting Fairy products is the perfect solution.

description.plain: Water Kefir Grains are live probiotics in the form of soft, jelly-like ‘grains’ from a cactus plant. When healthy and fed, these grains will continue to grow and multiply and produce an endless supply of water kefir. Use Water Kefir Grains to make naturally gut-healthy, bubbly water kefir at home! It’s as easy as mixing sugar into water - our Water Kefir Grains will do the rest. Don’t worry, the sugar isn’t for you. The grains will metabolize the sugar during the fermentation process and the final kefir water will be very low in sugar. INCLUDED IN THE BAG 1 packet of dehydrated traditional, heirloom-style water kefir grains.Instructions for using this culture are included and may be found here. INGREDIENTS AND ALLERGEN INFORMATION Water Kefir IngredientsOrganic sugar, live active cultures Water Kefir Allergen InformationManufactured in a facility that produces products containing soy and dairy.Non-GMOGluten-Free HOW TO STORE YOUR STARTER CULTURE Store the starter culture in a cool, dry place until you’re ready to activate it. Use the starter culture by the date on the bag. SUPPLIES YOU'LL NEED IngredientsSpring Water (Free of Chlorine and Fluoride)Organic Cane Sugar Equipment1 Quart-Sized Glass JarCoffee Filter or Butter MuslinRubber BandThermometerPlastic or Stainless Steel Mesh Strainer

variants.title: Raw Organic Vegan Water Kefir Grains 15g + Recipe E-Book

description.plain: Choose express shipping to ensure your fresh kefir grains arrive quickly and maintain their quality for the best results! What is Water Kefir? Create delicious all-natural, probiotic beverages for your family. Dairy free, vegan and raw. Water kefir is made from kefir grains, also known as sugar grains, tibicos, tibi, or Japanese water crystals. The grains are made up of a culture of various strains of healthy bacteria and yeast, held together in a polysaccharide matrix created by the bacteria. The microbes feed on sugar and produce lactic acid, and carbon dioxide, yielding a fermented carbonated beverage very low in sugar. The Potential Benefits of Water Kefir? Water Kefir is a probiotic - a source of beneficial bacteria and yeasts which help maintain a healthy digestive system. Potential Health Benefits Look and feel healthier in days Boosts immune system Potent probiotics with approx.15 strains Strong Anti-inflammatory Optimises digestion and utilisation of nutrients from food consumed Alkalises and detoxifies the body Rich in Vitamins and Minerals Feel more energetic and vibrant How to Make Water Kefir? Simply add 1 tbs (15g) of organic water grains as purchased to 500 ml spring water and Organic Water Kefir Growth Premix to make 500 ml of water kefir every 48 hours. Instructions and ongoing support included with purchase. We highly recommend using our Organic Water Kefir Growth Premix to simplify the process and boost probiotic content. Detailed Instructions Here Serving Suggestions Water kefir can be consumed as is or flavoured with your favourite juices and superfoods. Ingredients Raw Organic Kefir Grains Laboratory Analysed and Certified Probiotic Species here Storage of Water Kefir Grains When you are not making water kefir you can store water kefir grains in a refrigerator in sugar water for up to 2 weeks. For long-term storage, water kefir grains can be dehydrated. SHIPPING INFORMATION IMPORTANT: We only ship kefir grains on a Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday so that they do not remain in transit via Australia Post over the weekend Link to Recipe Ebook will be sent by email when the item is shipped. Please check your shipping confirmation email and If you haven't received make sure to check your Junk Email Folder.

description.plain: In partnership with Tippecanoe Herbs - Golden Milk is a classic Ayurvedic formula for vitality, stamina, and the strength of the core immune function all packaged up for easy use. Tippecanoe's Golden Milk blend includes: Astragalus (promotes core immune strength) Ashwagandha (also known as Indian Ginseng, an adaptogen herb for stress and energy) Ginger (a stimulating digestive plant) Shatavari (an adaptogen that has system wide benefits and a sweet taste) Turmeric (anti inflammatory) Cardamom - (aromatic spice aiding in the assimilation of the other herbs) Cinnamon (sweet spice that balances blood sugar) Kefir means "Feel Good" In Turkish. It is one of the oldest fermented foods in the world, and is teaming with live probiotics. They make kefir by hand in small batches and let it ferment slowly. Plain stevia extract is used to sweeten the flavored kefir. It has no unpleasant aftertaste. Enjoy! How do we use our Kefir? On granola or hot cereal In a smoothie Over fruit On top of dessert On chili, soups, and stews Between your favorite cookies Layer in a parfait As a salad dressing base Have fun, be creative! Looking for shipping? Head to Franniescoconutkefir.com

variants.title: Organic Milk Kefir Grains 5g + Recipe E-Book

description.plain: Choose express shipping to ensure your fresh kefir grains arrive quickly and maintain their quality for the best results! Laboratory Analysed and Certified Species here Milk kefir grains contain a probiotic strain: Lactobacillus kefiranofaciens CGMCC2809 (ZW3) which may improve depression by regulating the gut microbiota as a probiotic food. Link to Study What is Milk Kefir Probiotic Drink? Milk Kefir is a fermented milk drink that originated in the Caucasian Mountains near Turkey, where it was used for centuries as a healthy drink. Kefir is traditionally made with milk kefir grains. Kefir has the texture and consistency of thin drinking yoghurt, with a yeasty, slightly tart flavour and creamy mouthfeel. Make delicious all-natural organic kefir for your family every day. You only need to purchase our culture once for a lifetime supply. How Does Kefir work? Kefir is a probiotic - a source of beneficial bacteria and yeasts which help maintain a healthy digestive system. Health Benefits: Look and feel healthier in days Feel more energetic and vibrant Boosts immune system Potent probiotics with approximately 30 to 100 strains Lowers cholesterol Lower Blood Sugar Anti-oxidant Strong Anti-inflammatory Optimises digestion and utilisation of nutrients from food consumed Alkalises and detoxifies the body How to Make Milk Kefir Simply add 1 tsp (5g) of fresh organic milk kefir grains as purchased to 250ml ml organic milk and produce 1 cup of milk kefir every 24 hours. Instructions and ongoing support are included with the purchase. We highly recommend adding our Milk Kefir Growth Premix or Pure Colostrum Powder to boost immune function and the growth of probiotic organisms. Detailed Instructions here Serving Suggestions Serve Kefir with your favourite fruit and honey, or add to smoothies. Milk kefir can also be used to make salad dressing, ice-cream, cheese and many other delicious foods (see recipe book included). Ingredients Organic Milk Kefir Grains Storage of Milk Kefir If you are not making milk kefir you can store milk kefir grains in a refrigerator in milk for up to 2 weeks. For long-term storage, milk kefir grains can be stored in a freezer for up to 2 years. After freezing, milk kefir grain may take up to 4 batches before returning to original potency. SHIPPING INFORMATION IMPORTANT: We only ship Kefir Grains on a Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday so that they do not remain in transit via Australia Post over the weekend Link to Recipe Ebook will be sent by email when the item is shipped. Please check your shipping confirmation email and If you haven't received make sure to check your Junk Email Folder.

description.plain: Milk Kefir grains are live probiotics in the form of soft, jelly-like ‘grains’. They are grown in milk, thus giving it their name. The term "kefir grains" describes the look of the culture only, but they aren’t actually grains. When healthy and fed, these grains will continue to grow and multiply. Milk Kefir has many health benefits and is one of the richest sources of probiotics! Just one pouch of grains will culture 4 cups every day. Drink it up, or enjoy your Kefir in smoothies, ice cream, baked goods, and other recipes. *Milk Kefir is Excluded From Discounts INCLUDED IN THE BAG 1 packet of dehydrated traditional, heirloom-style milk kefir grains.Instructions for using this culture are included and may be found here. INGREDIENTS AND ALLERGEN INFORMATION Milk Kefir IngredientsOrganic powdered milk, organic milk, live active cultures.Packaged in a small amount of organic powdered milk to extend shelf life. Milk Kefir Allergen InformationManufactured in a facility that produces products containing soy and dairy.Non-GMO HOW TO STORE YOUR STARTER CULTURE Store the starter culture in a cool, dry place until you’re ready to activate it. Use the starter culture by the date on the bag. SUPPLIES YOU'LL NEED IngredientsPasteurized Whole Milk (Not UHT/Ultra-Pasteurized) Equipment1 Quart-Sized Glass JarCoffee Filter or Butter MuslinRubber BandThermometerPlastic or Stainless Steel Mesh Strainer

Treat your gut to homemade milk kefir, one of our most probiotic-rich cultures. Just one box will culture 4 cups every day. Drink it up, or enjoy your kefir in smoothies, ice cream, baked goods, and much more. Shelf stable. Quality Tested We test our cultures for the presence of coliform - a bacteria contamination that leads to potential health risks. Safe Food Consumption is Less Than 10/cfu/ml Our Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: <10 cfu/ml Brand One Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: 4,400,000 cfu/ml Brand Two Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: 30 cfu/ml

media.alt_text: Milk kefir grains for fermenting probiotic dairy drinks

description.plain: Milk kefir grains are dehydrated active cultures consisting of yeast and bacteria existing in a symbiotic relationship. Milk kefir grains need to be rehydrated using pasteurized dairy milk (not raw milk) before regular use. Once milk kefir grains are rehydrated, they can be transitioned to raw milk. Milk kefir grains can be used to culture coconut, soy, or rice milk once rehydrated, but must be rehydrated in dairy milk first. Milk kefir grains require regular refreshing in fresh dairy milk (as soon as the texture changes.) Milk Kefir Grains Ingredients: Organic powdered milk, organic milk, live active cultures. Contains no GMO ingredients

Start fermenting your own milk kefir at home with these potent, quality-tested grains. A single packet produces four cups daily—enough for drinking straight, blending into smoothies, or incorporating into ice cream and baked goods. Each case includes eight units for consistent supply. Rigorously tested for safety with coliform levels below 10 cfu/ml, these grains deliver probiotic benefits without compromise. Shelf-stable and ready to culture whenever you need them.

Treat your gut to homemade milk kefir, one of our most probiotic-rich cultures. Just one box will culture 4 cups every day. Drink it up, or enjoy your kefir in smoothies, ice cream, baked goods, and much more. Shelf stable. Quality Tested We test our cultures for the presence of coliform - a bacteria contamination that leads to potential health risks. Safe Food Consumption is Less Than 10/cfu/ml Our Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: <10 cfu/ml Brand One Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: 4,400,000 cfu/ml Brand Two Milk Kefir Grains Level of Coliform Present: 30 cfu/ml

variants.title: Cultures For Health Milk Kefir Grains

description.plain: Milk Kefir grains are live probiotics in the form of soft, jelly-like ‘grains’. They are grown in milk, thus giving it their name. The term "kefir grains" describes the look of the culture only, but they aren’t actually grains. When healthy and fed, these grains will continue to grow and multiply. Milk Kefir has many health benefits and is one of the richest sources of probiotics! Just one pouch of grains will culture 4 cups every day. Drink it up, or enjoy your Kefir in smoothies, ice cream, baked goods, and other recipes. Ingredients: Organic Powdered Milk, Organic Milk, Live Active Cultures *This product requires refrigeration and we are unable to ship it - available for local delivery and pick up only*

media.alt_text: Cultures For Health Milk Kefir Grains

description.plain: Treat your gut to homemade milk kefir, one of the most probiotic-rich cultures from Cultures of Health. Just one box will culture 4 cups every day. Drink it up, or enjoy your kefir in smoothies, ice cream, baked goods, and much more. Shelf stable.

These jelly-like 'grains' contain an industry-leading amount of lactobacillus kefiranofaciens – which is what ultimately provides up to 4 cups of this potent probiotic a day when properly maintained. Continuously tested, Culture for Health grains are guaranteed to deliver you all of the good bacteria, and none of the bad bacteria. Includes 1 packet of dehydrated traditional, heirloom-style milk kefir grains. Instructions for using this culture Ingredients Organic powdered milk, organic milk, live active cultures. Packaged in a small amount of organic powdered milk to extend shelf life. Allergen Information Manufactured in a facility that produces products containing soy and dairy. Non-GMO
